apis.name: Twitter / X API
apis.freeLimit: Free tier: 1 app, 1,500 tweets/mo write, 10k reads/mo
apis.note: Heavily paywalled since 2023, very limited
apis.ecnhValue: Good for eCNH community announcements, sentiment bots, price alerts, trending tags

apis.name: Discord API
apis.freeLimit: Completely FREE — no rate limit for basic bots
apis.note: Best free API for crypto communities
apis.ecnhValue: Ideal for eCNH community server — holder verification, price bots, governance votes, announcements

apis.name: Reddit API
apis.note: Heavily restricted for commercial use since 2023
apis.ecnhValue: Post eCNH updates to r/CryptoCurrency, r/Solana, r/DeFi — 50M+ daily active users

apis.name: Telegram Bot API
apis.note: Best free messaging API globally, crypto standard
apis.ecnhValue: Best fit for eCNH — alert bots, trading signals, auto news, community groups across Asia

apis.name: YouTube Data API v3
apis.note: Quota resets daily at midnight UTC
apis.ecnhValue: Embed eCNH educational videos, crypto market news, Solana ecosystem tutorials

apis.name: GitHub API
apis.note: Very generous free tier for developers
apis.ecnhValue: Open-source eCNH tools, smart contract repo, developer community building

apis.name: LinkedIn API
apis.freeLimit: No public free API for posting
apis.note: Partner program only, requires approval
apis.ecnhValue: B2B outreach for eCNH enterprise/institutional adoption, professional networking

apis.name: TikTok API
apis.note: Limited to display & login APIs
apis.ecnhValue: Short video campaigns for eCNH awareness targeting Gen Z and young crypto investors

apis.name: Slack API
apis.freeLimit: Free: full bot API, webhooks, 10k message history
apis.note: Great for internal teams and small communities
apis.ecnhValue: Internal eCNH team coordination, automated trading alerts, developer workspace bots

apis.name: WhatsApp Business API
apis.note: Reaches 2B+ users across Asia, Middle East, Africa
apis.ecnhValue: Mass eCNH adoption outreach in Asia, Middle East, Africa — 2B+ users, perfect for CNH markets

apis.name: OpenAI API
apis.freeLimit: Trial credits vary by account and region
apis.note: Strong tool calling, multimodal models, structured outputs, and agent workflows
apis.ecnhValue: Core AI mentor, eCNH documentation assistant, risk summaries, multilingual CNH market explanations

apis.name: Anthropic Claude API
apis.note: Excellent long-context analysis and careful writing
apis.ecnhValue: Long-form policy analysis, compliance notes, and community FAQ generation for eCNH

apis.name: Google Gemini API
apis.freeLimit: Free tier available with rate limits
apis.note: Strong Google ecosystem integration
apis.ecnhValue: Multimodal research assistant for education content, charts, and campaign assets

apis.name: Mistral AI API
apis.freeLimit: La Plateforme free experiments may vary
apis.note: European AI provider with efficient open-weight model options
apis.ecnhValue: Cost-conscious assistant and classification workflows for eCNH community tools

apis.name: Cohere API
apis.freeLimit: Trial key and limited free usage available
apis.note: Strong embeddings, reranking, and enterprise search
apis.ecnhValue: Search eCNH docs, API references, governance posts, and support tickets

apis.name: Perplexity API
apis.note: Useful for web-grounded answers and research flows
apis.ecnhValue: Industry insights feed, competitor tracking, and market-news summaries for eCNH

apis.name: Hugging Face Inference API
apis.note: Largest open model marketplace and hosted inference options
apis.ecnhValue: Prototype eCNH classifiers, sentiment models, translation, and open-source AI components

apis.name: Replicate API
apis.note: Fast access to many image, video, and audio models
apis.ecnhValue: Generate campaign visuals, educational illustrations, and community memes when needed

apis.name: ElevenLabs API
apis.note: High-quality text-to-speech and voice agents
apis.ecnhValue: Voice explainers and multilingual audio updates for eCNH onboarding

apis.name: Pinecone API
apis.note: Managed vector database for production RAG
apis.ecnhValue: Memory layer for AI Mentor, API docs search, governance archives, and community knowledge base

stack.title: Community Command Center
stack.description: Launch eCNH communities, verify holders, answer support questions, and broadcast time-sensitive CNH market updates.

stack.title: AI Mentor + Knowledge Base
stack.description: Power multilingual mentoring, semantic search, structured API answers, and retrieval over eCNH docs and governance history.

stack.title: Growth + Developer Loop
stack.description: Publish developer tooling, distribute education videos, and monitor social sentiment around eCNH, Solana, and CNH liquidity.
